originalTitle: Ibrahima Konaté poised to leave Liverpool after failing to agree new contract
summary: Ibrahima Konaté looks poised to leave Liverpool after failing to agree a contract extension
content: Ibrahima Konaté looks set to leave Liverpool after failing to agree a contract extension. The 27-year-old’s representatives have been in extensive talks with the club about extending his five-year stay at Anfield but it now looks certain that the France international will leave for free. If Konaté walks away from Liverpool out of contract, it will be the second consecutive year – after Trent Alexander-Arnold ran down his deal before a £10m move to Real Madrid – that the club will have lost one of their first-choice defenders without receiving a significant fee. Konaté has had a disappointing season but losing an established centre-back will come as a blow for the sporting director Richard Hughes, with new defensive recruits Jérémy Jacquet and Giovanni Leoni both working their way back to fitness after significant injuries and transfer speculation swirling over the future of Joe Gomez. With Mohamed Salah and Andy Robertson also leaving, Konaté’s departure would mean another mainstay of the Jürgen Klopp era departing. The Paris-born player is now likely to be courted by Paris Saint-Germain, although Chelsea have also been linked with a move. In April the defender hinted he would like to stay at Anfield when he opened up about the contract negotiations. He said: “My future? There are many things people have said but for a long time we have spoken with the club and we are close to an agreement. I think everyone wished for that for as long as possible but we are in a good way. “There is a big chance I’m here next season. This is what I always wanted. I’m waiting to sort the contract but when everything is sorted you will have to ask Richard [Hughes, Liverpool’s sporting director] what I said to him in September, November and he’s going to say something to make everyone quiet.”
chineseTitle: 易卜拉希马·科纳特在未能同意新合同后准备离开利物浦
chineseSummary: 在未能同意续约后，易卜拉希马·科纳特看起来准备离开利物浦
chineseContent: 在未能同意续约后，易卜拉希马·科纳特看起来将离开利物浦。这位27岁球员的代表一直在与俱乐部就延长他在安菲尔德的五年任期进行广泛谈判，但现在看来这位法国国脚将免费离开。如果科纳特在合同到期后离开利物浦，这将是继特伦特·亚历山大-阿诺德在以 1000 万英镑转会皇家马德里之前终止合同之后，俱乐部将连续第二年失去他们的首选后卫之一，而没有收到大笔费用。科纳特度过了一个令人失望的赛季，但失去一名成熟的中后卫对体育总监理查德·休斯来说将是一个打击，新的防守新兵杰里米·雅凯和乔瓦尼·莱奥尼在严重受伤后都在努力恢复健康，而转会传闻也围绕乔·戈麦斯的未来展开。随着穆罕默德·萨拉赫和安迪·罗伯逊也离开，科纳特的离开将意味着尤尔根·克洛普时代的另一位中流砥柱离开。这位出生于巴黎的球员现在很可能受到巴黎圣日耳曼的青睐，尽管切尔西也与转会联系在一起。四月，这名后卫在公开合同谈判时暗示他想留在安菲尔德。他说：“我的未来？人们已经说了很多话，但我们已经与俱乐部进行了很长一段时间的交谈，我们已经接近达成协议。我想每个人都希望尽可能长时间地实现这一点，但我们的情况很好。下赛季我很有可能在这里。这就是我一直想要的。我正在等待整理合同，但当一切都整理好后，你必须问理查德（利物浦体育总监休斯）我在九月和十一月对他说了什么，他会说一些让每个人都安静下来的事情
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于全球新闻信号，适合用于观察外部环境、政策变化、地缘风险和市场情绪。
